Functions to initialize and evict app session capabilities using UUIDs.

# Purpose
This C source code file defines two functions related to session capabilities management. The function [`comm_session_app_session_capabilities_init`](<#comm_session_app_session_capabilities_init>) is intended to initialize session capabilities, although it currently contains no implementation. The function [`comm_session_app_session_capabilities_evict`](<#comm_session_app_session_capabilities_evict>) takes a pointer to a `Uuid` structure as an argument and is designed to handle the eviction of session capabilities associated with a specific application UUID. The file includes the header `util/uuid.h`, which suggests that it relies on UUID-related functionality defined elsewhere.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `util/uuid.h`
